subcodes.title: Sahifiy-i-Ha’iyyih
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath created the heavens and the earth by His command. Verily they who believe in God and His signs - these are they who turn unto God. God beareth witness that there is no god [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله القائم القدوس. الحمد لله الذی خلق السموات و الارض بامره و ان الذین یومنون بالله و ایاته اولئک هم الی الله یقلبون شهد الله انه لا اله
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for protection, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause
